title: Sodium Fullbright
description: Changes the maximum brightness option in Sodium from 100% to 1000%
body:
This mod simply allows you to change the brightness option in Sodium from 100% to 1000%.

![Screenshot showcasing high brightness value in Sodium menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2164ce345691545f0caf94db447cba7c4f922e9f_0.webp)

I made this mod because I was looking for an option to change my brightness without having to bind a key. It makes the most sense **for me** to simply change it in the video settings.

If you are looking for a mod that has more options regarding full brightness and this one isn't cutting it, I absolutely recommend [GammaUtils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils), it's a great mod.

## Notes

- No, I don't intend to support vanilla video settings.
- Yes, I might make the max value configurable.
- Yes, I might add a Sodium option menu item for toggling the max brightness value
